name: Shish Tawook
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix yogurt, vinegar, lemon juice, catsup, olive oil, and spices together in a bowl.
2. Add chicken breasts to the marinade and stir to coat evenly.
3. Marinate the chicken for at least 12 hours in the refrigerator.
4. When ready to cook, thread the marinated chicken onto skewers.
5. Cook over hot coals until the chicken is fully cooked through.
6. Serve with Arabic bread.
7. To make garlic sauce, place all ingredients in a food processor and blend until creamy and light. Refrigerate before serving.
Note: Do not rush the cooking process to prevent burning or undercooking the chicken.
